apiKey.title: API key
apiKey.description: Get your API key from elevenlabs.io/app/settings/api-keys

voiceId.title: Voice ID
voiceId.description: The ElevenLabs voice ID to use for speech synthesis

texts.aboutApiSettings: Configure your ElevenLabs API settings. You need a valid API key and voice ID to use ElevenLabs as the buddy TTS provider.
